elements.name: TC-MED-001 | REQ-MED-001 GET /MedicationRequest/{id} returns 200 and resourceType = MedicationRequest
TC-MED-002 | REQ-MED-002 status is a valid MedicationRequest status value
TC-MED-003 | REQ-MED-003 intent is a valid MedicationRequest intent value
TC-MED-005 | REQ-MED-005 medicationCodeableConcept or medicationReference is present
TC-MED-006 | REQ-MED-006 | REQ-GEN-002a meta.lastUpdated is present
TC-MED-007 | REQ-MED-007 | REQ-OO-001 non-existent ID returns 404 and OperationOutcome

elements.name: TC-MED-008 | REQ-GEN-001 captured medication-read.json exists for HL7 Validator

steps.name: def fileExists = java.nio.file.Files.exists(java.nio.file.Paths.get('target/responses/medication/medication-read.json'))
comments: # karate.write() resolves paths under target/ when running under Maven
